foreground.$description: Foreground color of editor widgets, such as find/replace

background.$description: Background color of editor widgets, such as Find/Replace

border.$description: Border color of the editor widget unless the widget does not contain a border or defines its own border color

resizeBorder.$description: Border color of the resize bar of editor widgets

foreground.$description: Foreground color of the suggestion widget

background.$description: Background color of the suggestion widget

border.$description: Border color of the suggestion widget

highlightForeground.$description: Color of the match highlights in the suggestion widget

selectedBackground.$description: Background color of the selected entry in the suggestion widget

background.$description: Background color of the editor hover

border.$description: Border color of the editor hover

statusBarBackground.$description: Background color of the editor hover status bar
